description: Migrate the Bitbucket plugin to use SDK utilities: replace manual cookie parsing with getCookie, replace manual globalThis access with getPageGlobal, and replace manual waitForAuth with waitUntil.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/bitbucket && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Migrate Bitbucket plugin to SDK utilities
userStories.description: Replace Bitbucket's manual cookie parsing, globalThis access, and waitForAuth with SDK equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: getCsrfToken uses getCookie('csrftoken') from SDK instead of manual document.cookie.match
Page global access uses getPageGlobal('__app_data__.user.uuid') instead of manual window cast
waitForAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/bitbucket/src/bitbucket-api.ts

Context:
1. Cookie parsing: Replace with `const getCsrfToken = (): string | null => getCookie('csrftoken');`

2. Page global for reading __app_data__.user.uuid — replace with getPageGlobal('__app_data__.user.uuid').

3. waitForAuth — standard polling pattern.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change api() or apiRaw() or any tool files
